name: Cursed Cove
short_description: Cursed Cove is an exciting 3D strategic game where players immerse themselves in a dark world of pirates and necromancy. Your task is to capture the enemy tower using an army of skeletons that you can summon.
detailed_description:
Cursed Cove is an exciting 3D strategic game where players immerse themselves in a dark world of pirates and necromancy.
Your task is to capture the enemy tower using an army of skeletons that you can summon.
Strategically position your skeletons to attack the tower's cannons and archers, breaking through defensive lines and moving closer to victory.
Each level offers new challenges and opportunities to improve your necromancer skills. Are you ready to raise the black flag and embark on conquest?

Game Features:

3D Graphics
Strategic Planning
Variety of Skeletons
